openFindings.title: Packet rationale cites a missing research source
openFindings.summary: The packet still depends on ../research/research.md, but no research file exists under the current 002-content-routing-accuracy tree, so the rationale is no longer independently reviewable.

openFindings.title: Packet evidence still points at stale content-router line ranges
openFindings.summary: The docs still cite 345-352 and 853-860, but the delivery cue bundle and strongDeliveryMechanics guard now live at 404-423 and 965-993, so the evidence trail no longer lands on the claimed logic.

openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still carries the legacy 010 phase slug
openFindings.summary: The packet moved to 001-search-and-routing-tuning, but description.json still indexes 010-search-and-routing-tuning in parentChain, which violates the generator contract and pollutes searchable metadata.

openFindings.title: Continuity frontmatter lags the latest packet metadata refresh
openFindings.summary: implementation-summary continuity still reports a 2026-04-13 update while graph-metadata reflects a 2026-04-21 save, so the resume surface trails the canonical metadata by eight days.

openFindings.title: Core packet docs still miss required template and anchor surfaces
openFindings.summary: The packet is marked complete, but five major docs still omit current template headers, machine-owned anchors, and _memory blocks, which breaks strict structured-retrieval validation.

openFindings.title: Completed checklist claims are not backed by structured evidence markers
openFindings.summary: The checklist marks major claims complete, but the checked lines do not carry structured evidence markers, so the packet fails the checklist-evidence gate under strict validation.

openFindings.title: decision-record frontmatter still says planned after completion
openFindings.summary: The packet is otherwise complete, but decision-record frontmatter still advertises planned, which adds avoidable state ambiguity for future maintainers.

blockedStopHistory.recoveryStrategy: Continue traceability review and validate the packet's evidence chain before allowing synthesis.
Hold synthesis until the packet's checked completion claims and continuity surfaces are restated with current evidence.
